textByHash.05cadb4ef80fff447bfef9d8a97ff82fdf1f897b: There's many a man and woman who could give you the information you need, but general store owners in each city will likely be your best bet.
textByHash.0687d10541dc9b1e7e98c2a8f838e796da0c8465: I'm here on a bit of a hunt. The hunt for treasure. Back in my home of Great Kourend, I came across a scroll. I believe it will lead me to something of great value.
textByHash.0d6bd8630fe934711a60c50240e2f0383a2b6bf6: Speak to the general store owners of each city. They should have enough knowledge of their own city to pry out of them what you need, and they always seem up for a chat.
textByHash.14d7b1347bf52afef9482cbfaf7c3a8dda0556d4: Hello again! What can I do for you?
textByHash.15585bb1170d525f26cff9fe7309c6ae2ce365cc: Across the sea, to the far west.
textByHash.1665750ff727b8463ef0b9fe1ea4319b930d5dc9: My client requires... another simple task. They assure me that it will be the last. Take this orb. You must activate it beside the Dark Altar, north of Arceuus.
textByHash.1834feb92d21391fc215f9b28cbccef21fc36864: Hmmm. Maybe you can. You probably know this area better than I do. You might be able to work the scroll out. I'll be able to reward you if you help.
textByHash.187cbb1fb512e86114619bcff9f3ee4c92f040fb: Ah I remember now. Apologies friend, my mind isn't what it once was.
textByHash.194e2f72ad75eb65d08ccaa9f388a782bda1d266: My client is interested in the hierarchy and general social organisation of Great Kourend. Especially when it comes to how it differs from the mainland.
textByHash.1b32c6c18825d40a219aef15cf58ec1ce2a2694e: I was just going to do it myself but as you're quite new around here, this might be a good opportunity for you to get to know the kingdom a bit better.
textByHash.1cbf28dedbe0f70f739beed41ca024c6fb11c4ae: Truly? You'd do that for me? Thank you so much. I can't thank you enough! My heart's been filled with regret ever since it happened... and I think having a small part of Copper back, would make me complete again.
textByHash.1cf563ed6cedd145a95a5157981eff11e0c76b8f: Simply touching a normal feather onto the paper should synchronise their magical ability to work together. You don't need any ink.
textByHash.1cf912a10f4bb1775580b503c549fc9779897052: However, since our last King died 20 years ago, the kingdom has instead been ruled by the Kourend Council.
textByHash.1ea45211659494da1cd38b0b472f7c42289cc434: As a matter of fact, , I do...
textByHash.204bc2a957fe757e6757bf193a503a6731d518ad: Since our last King died 20 years ago the kingdom has been ruled by an elected council.
textByHash.20a6575cd3f55d7185ab277c4a565ed0627d1a93: I suggest you try there. Talk to Archeio in the Arceuus Library. He can take you there.
textByHash.2250f496cfcfc515064e80fb651102a0541428b0: These remind me of a pet I once had. Please... put them away.
textByHash.231e464ff1198071676d738be08a0109c8ce42a7: Finally, to the south you'll find Hosidius. They focus on agriculture to provide food for all of Great Kourend.
textByHash.25494ead90cfc3c5bd0f459b46077d415e10f47e: , I haven't spoken with you since bringing you to Kourend, I have no idea what you're on ab--
textByHash.28777ebfc2ad2a10f1635f287ea406c1ced9c639: There are secrets in this world for which you are not ready.
textByHash.28ab17d9e610dbc921ae8a79116a0f44c844c689: Looks like a map to me. I'd assume the X marks where you need to go.
textByHash.327bd90a2548022378987549961c3bfaa5962061: If you ever fancy visiting the kingdom, come find me here. I'm more than happy to take you there. Consider it an extra thank you for your help.
textByHash.32de9d67a70b4d1bb4dece98e26f61f2c5f9fc16: Anyway, I'd best be getting back to Great Kourend. I'm sure I'll be back here before long though, there's always more treasure to be found.
textByHash.3545fe0bcdc1cba66bbb66f8467739ee6e7b701a: Alas, I've hit a bit of a blocker. The scroll has led me here but as I don't really know the area, I'm not sure what to do next.
textByHash.39a26128ac2bf6801541abcfb9bbb4f97517b984: I am Veos and I've just arrived in Port Sarim from a distant land.
textByHash.3a579c9cdbee076a553a11a89e898cf4ecb36531: However, since the last King died 20 years ago, the kingdom has instead been ruled by the Kourend Council.
textByHash.3b22bc56ae80075a01c15cc481cb54d023aaa23c: The name's Veos. I'm a treasure hunter from the wonderous Kingdom of Great Kourend.
textByHash.3dc3f895ccf9f297bf8ecdce9b0ca7822a5eb914: Not exactly... My client simply wishes to keep their 'knowledge gathering' on the down low.
textByHash.3f3b7d12f4ed88bc9b3557b5b47b04d649c9cb6e: Let me take those items off your hands.
textByHash.45f58d05d34434849ee24234abbbd397477a5030: ... I can't thank you enough for what you've done for me. I don't have a reward, but know that to me, this means so much. Perhaps in the future I can repay you.
textByHash.46c90a9c3288c6e2e81ef0b66bfe9097469fd4b1: One day, I was travelling on the mainland, nearby a tribe of Fremenniks. Not exactly a spring chicken at this point, my own wolf was pushing 19...
textByHash.495d349ed5e811fd9b763f5cc88a697a8919c113: My client is interested in the hierarchy and general social organisation of Great Kourend; how it differs from the mainland, per se.
textByHash.499e3cfe7f5498a7f33262ecb4a742170d9373c9: I'd hoped it might have some interesting information in it. Most of the pages are missing though so I have no use for it. I thought you might be able to find something to do with it.
textByHash.4b59a49e77aedd18f65384c0ca375eb367e6e08d: How goes the hunt for Copper's collar?
textByHash.4f88b62f23107c7179992fc67535964d1f10f1eb: You already have your scroll, , I can literally see it peeking out of your backpack...
textByHash.58b9f34b15cc3651bf90df1609adb9a317a89195: These are questions to which you shall not find answers, adventurer.
textByHash.5c9ad43bfb236aa030bec471dde061b017524c28: Certainly. The Kingdom of Great Kourend is made up of five main cities. They are the cities of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius. Each city is ruled by one of the five houses of Kourend.
textByHash.5cf5d283c00470580bb5988aad8d6627daa0555d: Not to worry. Just try to be careful with it.
textByHash.60ef13dd64a7568bf4ee7e17f26cbec7e58d20dd: Great Kourend is a magnificent kingdom comprising of five cities. They are the cities of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius. Each city is ruled by one of the five houses of Kourend.
textByHash.6712f81b88c8ce0d6accac163e016dcaa2483e7f: You'll probably want a spade, I find they're pretty much always needed when it comes to hunting treasure. Check the general store if you don't have one. If you need any extra help, just let me know.
textByHash.6c6cd6e503ba350f7d56378877e5d17101fd47e2: First you should go and make some room in your inventory. Once you've done that, you can have a look at this scroll.
textByHash.700bc2011da17b869e3f6fdf636fb0d9e6a63c1b: I am Veos. Port master and scout for an elite Triumvirate.
textByHash.7033b2b6053aea62c82608746575399f9fbd66c4: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.
textByHash.7222df43b453f200f711e38891e1c83c8f232d5e: Well that's just the thing. My client is pleased you found such information. Tell me... Would you be willing to do one last thing for them?
textByHash.7398379edd58f2555a03acd330d40f82e268520d: Remember: simply use a feather on the scroll to attune it as a quill.
textByHash.78536c4d3db9f751cafa0547d840141b12490a68: I came across this scroll. Did you lose it by any chance?
textByHash.7b16acf314a042e1eb7efe7c73fdc2e57b206f2d: I'm afraid not. Did you try the Library Historical Archive?
textByHash.804843941f517c2fad435fde8b51406b32e0c728: Well that's just the thing. My client is pleased you found such information. Tell me... Would you be willing to do one last thing for him?
textByHash.814ef698ce8ed6eb097d5b79abadfe0820fc93a4: Oh err... nothing important. Just something that might be of use to me back in Great Kourend.
textByHash.84b0c1be0ba8396bfdcd680faa07592b65c75cde: I'll be happy to provide you with another scroll, , though I'm afraid you don't seem to have any room in your backpack! Return to me when you have.
textByHash.85879d9392448f6a3b7cb79e9d7ff733c79603ca: That scroll I given to you is special. When written on with a particular type of quill, my client will see what you're writing without anything being seen on the scroll itself.
textByHash.878314824e10236c406f006fad481e01aec1e8de: I'm certainly glad you're able to assist once again.
textByHash.89b5e45cfe753300dc860e4fc870e1bcc7c4594e: I did not... I searched for days, but I was unable to find even his collar.
textByHash.8e36c8caf8da857e0e329640460e8347a91aa8bb: Zeah is a huge continent far to the west of here full of new adventures and hidden treasures. Sadly, the kingdom of Great Kourend is besieged by lizard creatures and it is not possible to get out of the kingdom just yet.
textByHash.8fc28306b6d43888e93b54aaa8c055ef465cf802: My client requires... another simple task. He assures me that it will be the last. Take this orb. You must activate it beside the Dark Altar.
textByHash.915219b8611b915eaba4c5156fc866edc7873afa: An ancient hero? Sounds like the Library Historical Archive is where you want to be. Talk to Archeio in the Arceuus Library. He can take you there.
textByHash.96d9cd93c15db8d3467a8c04c6b70600bfe0d9f5: Please be more careful. Remember to return to me when you have used the orb in the area.
textByHash.97228beb337bc9ccd6e07c64fb623ba4bc8e854e: But I haven't given you anything recently.
textByHash.9a6eb5d083558e409e762605ac61cdeb3cf01a4c: You cannot pass as you haven't unlocked access to the Great Kourend and Kebos Lowlands area in this League.
textByHash.9ba454800f66860ec93eeec5f27f138ea20a41f4: Fair enough. I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.9e062a42fb71830c0ac9bf0bcf1fcaf5bfbe46d6: Hello there. What can I do for you?
textByHash.9ebb1ae58d3455da317a361701070a5c435f3927: I'd imagine the fox which killed Copper will likely still have the collar in their possession. They were nearby a Fremennik town.
textByHash.a24edf8f2be8a02b5696216d0327f3db80196ea5: Brilliant. This is just what I was looking for. Thank you so much for your help.
textByHash.a528187c7a9d4960cb498d3882c062aab1dd9778: Unfortunately it seems that you're not quite ready to visit Great Kourend yet. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.
textByHash.a59575fe26a861624c2c9cae046bf6dc7b28b6f2: I do remember rewarding you. I'm afraid I don't have anything else for you though.
textByHash.a7245b4d5010eb6c9827ed498f29a1308133fa55: I have a client from the mainland interested in some more knowledge surrounding the houses of Kourend. Do you think you'd be able to retrieve it for me?
textByHash.a78d85760408bc147784f30e5fd0c5d092769f22: Where would you like to go?
textByHash.ad429af03e7781008c104bd15a43da30a106f87e: I'm here on a bit of a treasure hunt. Back in Kourend I came across a scroll. I believe it will lead me to something of great value.
textByHash.adce80761895555afc7a229fccf7270c08ef04c2: ... I can't thank you enough. I don't have a reward, but know that to me, this means so much. Perhaps in the future, I can repay you.
textByHash.b2e20aa23b52a7917d9872651be10dcb8166406c: Across the sea to the far west. It is a truly magnificent place.
textByHash.b31a633d41acd30492ddbf056962869c75211879: That scroll is special. When written on with a particular type of quill, my client will see what you're writing without anything being seen on the scroll itself.
textByHash.b4a51f635a2f6f77bbb9d6614a13975156f5198b: There's many a man and woman who could give you the information you need, but General store owners in house will likely be your best bet. They should know enough about their houses, and always seem up
textByHash.b6986c2d2831fd000048c32f7ef7401d5ba5bc15: This is the port of Piscarilius. Home to Kourend's finest fisherman, but beware of the thieves!
textByHash.bb03420e6ebc6256d06c2058de91c99ea2b1fe28: Take this scroll. It should lead you to the treasure I seek. Once you've found it, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.
textByHash.bd186a06bc6f05b1709e77cdc2fb6923a9734371: At one time, the kingdom as a whole was ruled over by a king or queen that the five houses answered to.
textByHash.bef9610df227bdb2b0cf407b548eca3fbeeafff1: My client will be most pleased.
textByHash.bf0f48beaeb2fcf1a93b1d413e1351d335a57183: Hello again, Azacor! What can I do for you?
textByHash.c431430b76e12ec96dd739c0ae7dcdd4d7307267: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.
textByHash.c546705b1b1990c2ee2a4e864628bb18e8c6ae61: Further west is Lovakengj, where you'll find our best miners and smithers working to arm the Shayzien soldiers to the south west.
textByHash.c6b31c909e166fda10a9a6a3a1d46f7b3965bad4: Ready to help with this treasure hunt?
textByHash.ca5a6471ba6c818f4e10ec84b4f4819b6256215a: Certainly! I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.
textByHash.cbc247866f3b85ba2691e1c057c7d3ea3e119118: I once had a wolf. His name was Copper. He was loyal. Brave... Gentle. He'd wear this beautiful crimson red collar.
textByHash.cc0affe526d7f6005255f8513b28c64577cad8ba: Not exactly... My client simply wishes to keep his 'knowledge gathering' on the down low before he makes his appearance.
textByHash.cdde4c769c9166640b45b6e5af513c94231360a8: I came across this orb. Did you lose it by any chance?
textByHash.ce5608b23becbf6e993aba65792635332ee4f93f: Great Kourend is a magnificent kingdom comprising of five districts called Houses. The houses are ruled by the Lords of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius.
textByHash.ceb0fa3b72d42ca27863d1f51dfbe835e5a41b51: Anyway, as promised, a reward for you.
textByHash.d019d010a71af0fd023030a685e4e3788b178d44: Very well. Do come back if you wish to help out my client.
textByHash.d3268191b65eabdc6373feaa4cf6b35cf2c22462: I was just going to do it myself, but as you're quite new around here, this might be a good opportunity for you to get to know the kingdom a bit better.
textByHash.d5b1185a0b24b0593daacb326ffecbc8917b0255: Ah a cipher, I've seen these before. Try shifting the letters to the left or right. That normally works.
textByHash.d5d58f8f6244647256f086c8942f7e4d4b4c30c8: You already have the orb, , I can literally see it peeking out of your backpack...
textByHash.d5e5ea447e98dba2d12ea426f992492ad637fd72: I have a client from the mainland who's interested in learning a bit more about Kourend. They've asked me to gather some information on the five cities for them.
textByHash.d683b4a8c100b66c9bf3446993637593e781cee5: They should know enough about their cities, and always seem up for a chat.
textByHash.d8bfbc3d5ddc09fb96cd150de0d27c82792fe687: Remember, if you still need to create a quill, simply attune a feather by using it on the scroll.
textByHash.d98a965ae2877a84a067cebcfe6fc2a9b6d511d9: Worry not, , I have many of those scrolls. Luckily, due to the way it works, you haven't lost any information on it!
textByHash.dbe2fa1e823157fe93534b060711bee4bc134e00: Hmmm. Well now that you mention it, I could do with some help. The name's Veos. I'm a treasure hunter from the wonderous Kingdom of Great Kourend.
textByHash.dd8a96b7f2083893754f33db1d3671996be24f6a: Certainly. To the west is the city of Arceuus, where they study magic at Kourend's Grand Library.
textByHash.e0f3a97b454dcfc5a5efd0c29e951230fc62e237: I'll be sticking around here a little longer before heading back to my ship. If you need extra guidance with anything, just let me know and I'll see what I can do.
textByHash.e18bebe09c4304c1cd1115734927e6a4ffa75776: You'll probably want a spade, I find they're pretty much always needed when it comes to hunting treasure. Check the general store if you don't have one.
textByHash.e252b46ba9c8c1a26bf579afad1cafeb397c62a1: Interesting, these are quite rare. They work using temperature. The closer you are, the hotter the orb.
textByHash.e38257e0f269412f52370c95a1342cb724b60371: I do have some things for you. Enjoy!
textByHash.e3e38d35e3230ffc17ad39f79c1490a549ba24dc: Hey there! Do you need something?
textByHash.e565950aee6b9c0c2e59767f3065cea2374d7cb1: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, bring it to me.
textByHash.e61cd5c5d7e67a15d300803ff4f8409f9a3893d9: Indeed. Sadly, a group of feral foxes ambushed us. I fought back, along with Copper, though he took wounds that even a young wolf would struggle dealing with.
textByHash.ec769c1229ce88f5e87e1907f75e95aa26c0ff0b: I am from the magnificent kingdom of Great Kourend on the continent of Zeah, to the far west.
textByHash.ef6b769ed4e6f4a9af1bd3f2760db4cd2c03811e: This is the scroll I gave you. I don't know how to solve it I'm afraid. Maybe look for someone named Bob?
textByHash.f09fa0d361243a912e2e96e9ba1383071195625d: , I haven't spoken with you since bringing you to Zeah, I have no idea what you're on ab--
textByHash.f315d08bd962c487e7ebbe4ab7b7080050545184: Yes, I heard it too... they mentioned that your task was complete.
textByHash.f372869dd0e145a7f37a307b1da220e7e948cf3a: I am Veos and I've just arrived in Port Sarim from the distant Kingdom of Great Kourend.
textByHash.f7e1541f0f9cf8357a771fa98e7e7da2c16eed12: Excellent. I'll take it off your hands now.
textByHash.f948ae175b99cf02047ef9a9fa07e1ffdc08c210: I'm afraid access to Great Kourend is currently prohibited.
textByHash.fcc06d17d05e8bf52241c2fb16682a9e549d3b99: If it makes you feel any better, my client sends their apologies. It wasn't intentional. Needless to say, something you said provoked emotion...
textByHash.fcd40aea42184083b3b0947bf31a984028f665b4: I'll be happy to provide you with another orb, , though I'm afraid you don't seem to have any room in your backpack! Return to me when you have room.
textByHash.ff152703b7010cfadf92736c6229ed69100d4a57: Ah that. I bought it at an auction a while back. Apparently, it belonged to the daughter of King Kharedst IV, the final king of Great Kourend.
textByHash.ffb240046ca5674e6b76f4c175e038e16f837a46: I'm afraid that you're not eligible to travel to Great Kourend at the moment. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.
